name: Conduit
description: Conduit personal communications hub — read messages, emails, and calendar; queue outbound sends for approval.

baseUrl.description: Base URL of your Conduit server, e.g. http://localhost:3101

apiKey.description: Conduit API key (sk-arb-...). Generate one in Settings → Permissions.

allowFrom.description: Allowlist of OpenClaw user identifiers permitted to receive Conduit messages. Leave empty to allow all.

webhookSecret.description: Optional secret Conduit sends as Authorization: Bearer <secret> on each inbound message for request verification.
